description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named win64 that runs on push to master and pymem branches, on pull requests, and on releases. Use a matrix job that runs on Windows 2022 with MSVC, Ninja generator, and Debug build type. Checkout the repository with a fetch depth of 25, set up the VS environment, print environment variables, install eigen3 with vcpkg, perform eigen introspection, configure CMake, build and introspect the project, and run tests with ctest.
